title: paspalum tenellum
intro: Paspalum tenellum is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as fine paspalum or seashore paspalum, and is native to tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The health benefits of Paspalum tenellum include its use as a natural diuretic, and it has been traditionally used to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine and natural health practices.
